arts.ttl: Breaking: Bayern Munich’s Sacha Boey suffers torn meniscus during training, undergoes surgery
arts.sum: In shocking news that emerged from training this morning, Bayern Munich right-back Sacha Boey is out with a meniscus tear. Sacha Boey will be out of action for Bayern for several weeks after the right-back suffered a meniscus tear in his left knee in training on Sunday, as confirmed following examination by the club’s medical department.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich release their yearly Oktoberfest kit
arts.sum: This is the fourth year in a row that Bayern have released an official "Wiesn" kit.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Sacha Boey sidelined for several weeks after undergoing surgery
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have today confirmed that Sacha Boey has suffered a meniscus tear and will be sidelined for several weeks. Boey (24), who joined the club from Galatasaray for €30m…

arts.ttl: Euro Leagues round-up: Yamal and Kane shine as Barca and Bayern look ominous
arts.sum: In a week where the big guns dominated, Sports Mole rounds up the weekend's top action from across Europe's elite leagues.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Dinamo Zagreb preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Tuesday's UEFA Champions League group stage clash between Bayern Munich and Dinamo Zagreb, including our predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl explains rationale for Bayern Munich letting Matthijs de Ligt leave over the summer
arts.sum: The towering Dutch defender was offloaded to Manchester United during the summer transfer window in what was a move that did not go down too well with the majority of Bayern fans. Over the weekend, after Bayern’s 6-1 win over Holstein Kiel, board member for sport Max Eberl was asked about the rationale for letting De Ligt leave the club during the summer window, especially since it was something not well received by the Bayern faithful.

arts.ttl: New injury blow for Bayern: Boey out for weeks after knee surgery
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have suffered another injury blow as Sasha Boey is set to be sidelined for weeks with a knee injury.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Dinamo Zagreb: UEFA Champions League team news, match stats & LIVE blog!
arts.sum: There are also options as to who flanks Kane, with Michael Olise impressing since his summer arrival, Serge Gnabry looking in good form, plus Kingsley Coman and the ever-green Thomas Müller - one of two surviving members of the team that played in the 2012 Champions League final in Munich, alongside Manuel Neuer . Bayern Munich will kick-off their tilt at the 2024/25 UEFA Champions League title by hosting Dinamo Zagreb at the Allianz Arena on Tuesday (kick-off: 9.00pm CEST).

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich set deadline for contract extensions
arts.sum: It has been made no secret that next summer, a number of high-profile Bayern Munich players are set to see their contracts come to an end. The players in question…

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works S7E8: Was the formation fielded by Vincent Kompany an actual 4-2-3-1? Will Bayern Munich continue playing this way in the league and the Champions League? What is going on with Leon Goretzka?+more!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich won 1-6 against Holstein Kiel; Cyler and Samrin break down the performance, wonder what Max Eberl is thinking when it comes to Leon Goretzka, discuss whether Uli Hoeness should still have a voice in sporting matters at Bayern and more: Cyler and Samrin discuss Bayern’s set up against Holstein Kiel and Bayern’s future fixtures against Bremen, Zagreb, Leverkusen and Frankfurt among other topics.
